hero.title:
Drive Bold.
Engineered Precision.
feat.forged.d: Unmatched strength-to-weight ratio for elite performance.
feat.cert.d: Rigorously tested for structural integrity and impact resistance.
feat.grip.d: Enhanced bead seat design to prevent tire slip under high torque.
feat.tpms.d: All rims pre-drilled and compatible with NEX Senser TPMS.
